stemHtml: Which statement about a Satellite Based Augmentation System (SBAS) is correct?

options.a: SBAS is an augmentation device for Ground Based Augmentation Systems.
options.b: SBAS is able to provide approach and landing operations with horizontal guidance only.
options.c: SBAS is able to provide guidance for precision approaches.
options.d: SBAS is able to provide approach and landing operations with vertical guidance only.
